metadata.description: Model-routing patterns for Claude Code: architect-as-orchestrator with Sonnet/Opus implementer lanes, parallel worktree fan-out with a local merge lane, and a Fable 5 commitment-boundary advisor.

plugins.name: fable-advisor
plugins.description: Architect-as-orchestrator: your session runs Claude's most capable model, routing implementation to Sonnet (default) and Opus (escalation) implementer lanes — with parallel worktree fan-out, a local merge integrator, and a commitment-boundary advisor.
